0cf7a1999b936f2c38aed2848c3ffb6812bfa6ef.text_normalized: Skill points can be redistributed at a space station. You instantly forget stuff, so weird.
0cf7a1999b936f2c38aed2848c3ffb6812bfa6ef.speaker: ECHO

a93815ba2588e5e890a89386d87f01cb126dfda1.text_raw: Did you know that Steel Vultures really are just that? Vultures the lot of them, look what they do to those pretty ships!
a93815ba2588e5e890a89386d87f01cb126dfda1.text_normalized: Did you know that Steel Vultures really are just that? Vultures the lot of them, look what they do to those pretty ships!
a93815ba2588e5e890a89386d87f01cb126dfda1.speaker: ECHO

427cecf8fed4baf5bda4bd31e8cd604e97ecf1bc.speaker: Gabriel Ramos
427cecf8fed4baf5bda4bd31e8cd604e97ecf1bc.text_raw: Hey, you look like you know your way around a space ship. Interested in an adventure?
427cecf8fed4baf5bda4bd31e8cd604e97ecf1bc.text_normalized: Hey, you look like you know your way around a space ship. Interested in an adventure?

09dac9362a533bc31db5170cd617587a0b0be44f.speaker: Gabriel Ramos
09dac9362a533bc31db5170cd617587a0b0be44f.text_raw: Do people even care about doing the right thing anymore? But yes, if you play your cards right, you'll be rich in no time.
09dac9362a533bc31db5170cd617587a0b0be44f.text_normalized: Do people even care about doing the right thing anymore? But yes, if you play your cards right, you'll be rich in no time.

2eed226e5e072aa66b783978b4839752952706d4.speaker: Gabriel Ramos
2eed226e5e072aa66b783978b4839752952706d4.text_raw: Troubling news is coming in from the galactic East. Apparently, the three major corporations have opened a new route to the rest of the galaxy, and they're currently entrenching their positions and preparing for war.
2eed226e5e072aa66b783978b4839752952706d4.text_normalized: Troubling news is coming in from the galactic East. Apparently, the three major corporations have opened a new route to the rest of the galaxy, and they're currently entrenching their positions and preparing for war.

19a7d71d3af6f0116af45373fca015105dae3b96.speaker: Gabriel Ramos
19a7d71d3af6f0116af45373fca015105dae3b96.text_raw: By the sound of it, diplomacy has started breaking down, and it's a mad dash to claim as much territory as possible, displacing the native Darkspace Compact. Here, take this Jumpgate Pass, and go check it out.
19a7d71d3af6f0116af45373fca015105dae3b96.text_normalized: By the sound of it, diplomacy has started breaking down, and it's a mad dash to claim as much territory as possible, displacing the native Darkspace Compact. Here, take this Jumpgate Pass, and go check it out.

c01b96ee14ba841412c062300dd7f5f9dce609f5.speaker: Cade Callahan
c01b96ee14ba841412c062300dd7f5f9dce609f5.text_raw: You've been busy. And about to get even more work on your hands...
c01b96ee14ba841412c062300dd7f5f9dce609f5.text_normalized: You've been busy. And about to get even more work on your hands.

90a524d594ff642ab7442b7e01993f11342634b2.speaker: Cade Callahan
90a524d594ff642ab7442b7e01993f11342634b2.text_raw: The major factions have gone to war.
90a524d594ff642ab7442b7e01993f11342634b2.text_normalized: The major factions have gone to war.

5525dde35838b700422d4d3ae7c1db7079439461.speaker: Cade Callahan
5525dde35838b700422d4d3ae7c1db7079439461.text_raw: They were always at war with eachother, but had to work together to get here so they played friendly.
5525dde35838b700422d4d3ae7c1db7079439461.text_normalized: They were always at war with eachother, but had to work together to get here so they played friendly.

393d55099d5e7738cf4762a65325085cdc9c32d8.speaker: Cade Callahan
393d55099d5e7738cf4762a65325085cdc9c32d8.text_raw: But now... no formal declarations. Probably no diplomacy. We were not informed.
393d55099d5e7738cf4762a65325085cdc9c32d8.text_normalized: But now, no formal declarations. Probably no diplomacy. We were not informed.

bf8e30b649eb16034acdee030355a137d4f052c0.speaker: Cade Callahan
bf8e30b649eb16034acdee030355a137d4f052c0.text_raw: It has to be Metafiber... but I'm not sure in what capacity.
bf8e30b649eb16034acdee030355a137d4f052c0.text_normalized: It has to be Metafiber, but I'm not sure in what capacity.

f1f87189cb6225b21a30a2752e817477b9c96d5e.speaker: Cade Callahan
f1f87189cb6225b21a30a2752e817477b9c96d5e.text_raw: But my job is not to speculate. My job is the law. I deal with criminals.
f1f87189cb6225b21a30a2752e817477b9c96d5e.text_normalized: But my job is not to speculate. My job is the law. I deal with criminals.

aae76d612ee9cf1802b4d386ee8b756a893bc2d1.speaker: Cade Callahan
aae76d612ee9cf1802b4d386ee8b756a893bc2d1.text_raw: Canisec was meant to keep the peace between them. That was the agreement, but that's out of the airlock.
aae76d612ee9cf1802b4d386ee8b756a893bc2d1.text_normalized: Canisec was meant to keep the peace between them. That was the agreement, but that's out of the airlock.

ebb0d90a015148692263368cf88bb5a230f67383.speaker: Cade Callahan
ebb0d90a015148692263368cf88bb5a230f67383.text_raw: My forces will mainly focus on the syndicate, those damn chosen weirdos, and see to the protection of the minor factions.
ebb0d90a015148692263368cf88bb5a230f67383.text_normalized: My forces will mainly focus on the syndicate, those damn chosen weirdos, and see to the protection of the minor factions.

5413d3096d351a0ca959c4ac2ac9fc134407f844.speaker: Cade Callahan
5413d3096d351a0ca959c4ac2ac9fc134407f844.text_raw: Well, those that are currently not active in the Conquest sector. Imagine Mindus controlling the entire sector, heh!
5413d3096d351a0ca959c4ac2ac9fc134407f844.text_normalized: Well, those that are currently not active in the Conquest sector. Imagine Mindus controlling the entire sector, heh!

1ea9eec491b6bc6f59260498fba4026ca4f6eb1d.speaker: Cade Callahan
1ea9eec491b6bc6f59260498fba4026ca4f6eb1d.text_raw: Wherever you want to be, Captain.
1ea9eec491b6bc6f59260498fba4026ca4f6eb1d.text_normalized: Wherever you want to be, Captain.

3057f6eed3d0dabd9c0f3a9d41ee8d71212af6f6.speaker: Cade Callahan
3057f6eed3d0dabd9c0f3a9d41ee8d71212af6f6.text_raw: Hmmph... I know that each of the three major factions is recruiting. They need ships to throw at eachother, and they eat through raw resources.
3057f6eed3d0dabd9c0f3a9d41ee8d71212af6f6.text_normalized: Hmmph, I know that each of the three major factions is recruiting. They need ships to throw at eachother, and they eat through raw resources.

7ba58dbd1dfeca87f025a392210f4b53be56646b.speaker: Cade Callahan
7ba58dbd1dfeca87f025a392210f4b53be56646b.text_raw: So you could speak to them. Hear what they have to say.
7ba58dbd1dfeca87f025a392210f4b53be56646b.text_normalized: So you could speak to them. Hear what they have to say.

6dba29a9c55d8c9b35cfe550208dbb349eb9c3e7.speaker: Cade Callahan
6dba29a9c55d8c9b35cfe550208dbb349eb9c3e7.text_raw: For now. Nothing's permanent in this sector.
6dba29a9c55d8c9b35cfe550208dbb349eb9c3e7.text_normalized: For now. Nothing's permanent in this sector.

6ea7a100cfddb142d26fbe7277f7c24d3a88ce23.speaker: Cade Callahan
6ea7a100cfddb142d26fbe7277f7c24d3a88ce23.text_raw: You can align with any of them. Run their missions. Support their bloodlust. Even by attacking the other factions.
6ea7a100cfddb142d26fbe7277f7c24d3a88ce23.text_normalized: You can align with any of them. Run their missions. Support their bloodlust. Even by attacking the other factions.

e9379cd490f16727a233ef4ea6beee1639d9b445.speaker: Cade Callahan
e9379cd490f16727a233ef4ea6beee1639d9b445.text_raw: Your reputation will take quite a beating, but that's why they set up embassy stations here in the staging sectors.
e9379cd490f16727a233ef4ea6beee1639d9b445.text_normalized: Your reputation will take quite a beating, but that's why they set up embassy stations here in the staging sectors.

de727af29a8fc4ac976914faa91cef71ccf95d97.speaker: Cade Callahan
de727af29a8fc4ac976914faa91cef71ccf95d97.text_raw: Go there if you wish to improve your standing with them. The stations are neutral territory.
de727af29a8fc4ac976914faa91cef71ccf95d97.text_normalized: Go there if you wish to improve your standing with them. The stations are neutral territory.

9a170cfefbdd0bd73db1ac4683d7c7f682d473f5.speaker: Adeline Lorentz
9a170cfefbdd0bd73db1ac4683d7c7f682d473f5.text_raw: Captain, you should really improve your standing with us, before we can hire you.
9a170cfefbdd0bd73db1ac4683d7c7f682d473f5.text_normalized: Captain, you should really improve your standing with us, before we can hire you.

839b2bc5799302c3796f4e932ef25415836747a9.speaker: Adeline Lorentz
839b2bc5799302c3796f4e932ef25415836747a9.text_raw: Captain, we are currently not able to offer you a job position. We are working on retaking a system.
839b2bc5799302c3796f4e932ef25415836747a9.text_normalized: Captain, we are currently not able to offer you a job position. We are working on retaking a system.

76fc70a5a90f3ef91aa054e01f653dfc66c2762b.speaker: Adeline Lorentz
76fc70a5a90f3ef91aa054e01f653dfc66c2762b.text_raw: Ah, Captain. I was hoping we'd meet again.
76fc70a5a90f3ef91aa054e01f653dfc66c2762b.text_normalized: Ah, Captain. I was hoping we'd meet again.

0bd1bf93c0ee8a3a41071e1140e9f9999e4f5b8e.speaker: Adeline Lorentz
0bd1bf93c0ee8a3a41071e1140e9f9999e4f5b8e.text_raw: Great! Your skills are exactly what we need.
0bd1bf93c0ee8a3a41071e1140e9f9999e4f5b8e.text_normalized: Great! Your skills are exactly what we need.

840b957cf5e1919dbd6c6037120659f6644cd10a.speaker: Adeline Lorentz
840b957cf5e1919dbd6c6037120659f6644cd10a.text_raw: We would like to offer you a position. We offer really good benefits. Access to our fleets... destroyers...
840b957cf5e1919dbd6c6037120659f6644cd10a.text_normalized: We would like to offer you a position. We offer really good benefits. Access to our fleets, destroyers.

48796f4280de7aa5e999d5319378435ad219c176.speaker: Adeline Lorentz
48796f4280de7aa5e999d5319378435ad219c176.text_raw: You can work from home, or well spaceship. Uniform is optional, but credits and resources come standard.
48796f4280de7aa5e999d5319378435ad219c176.text_normalized: You can work from home, or well spaceship. Uniform is optional, but credits and resources come standard.

098d8a2fb06f00142277ff3814ea29d76753a37b.speaker: Adeline Lorentz
098d8a2fb06f00142277ff3814ea29d76753a37b.text_raw: By helping us we would gain Fleet Strength, which we can use to push out other factions from surrounding systems.
098d8a2fb06f00142277ff3814ea29d76753a37b.text_normalized: By helping us we would gain Fleet Strength, which we can use to push out other factions from surrounding systems.

e20dced216cf7841233bb1da1cc6e7b593d06141.speaker: Adeline Lorentz
e20dced216cf7841233bb1da1cc6e7b593d06141.text_raw: This in turn will help you, unlocking those perks I mentioned before...
e20dced216cf7841233bb1da1cc6e7b593d06141.text_normalized: This in turn will help you, unlocking those perks I mentioned before.

d5f02d508d1db67ff1a26223f61bd7c94e7eadad.speaker: Adeline Lorentz
d5f02d508d1db67ff1a26223f61bd7c94e7eadad.text_raw: There's a jumpgate linking this system to our headquarters in the Conquest sector.
d5f02d508d1db67ff1a26223f61bd7c94e7eadad.text_normalized: There's a jumpgate linking this system to our headquarters in the Conquest sector.

850438ce5a5a0203328ee3b1645dc30ecd6cbb6e.speaker: Adeline Lorentz
850438ce5a5a0203328ee3b1645dc30ecd6cbb6e.text_raw: When you accept, meet up with
850438ce5a5a0203328ee3b1645dc30ecd6cbb6e.text_normalized: When you accept, meet up with

66cb618b88612ff9288eb18794cda829af78e03b.speaker: Victor Hale
66cb618b88612ff9288eb18794cda829af78e03b.text_raw: Time is credits, Captain. So I'll keep this somewhat short.
66cb618b88612ff9288eb18794cda829af78e03b.text_normalized: Time is credits, Captain. So I'll keep this somewhat short.

5daedbeab771cefc1d7f4c5d772db3baa0b896fd.speaker: Victor Hale
5daedbeab771cefc1d7f4c5d772db3baa0b896fd.text_raw: Stellar Industries sees the value you bring.
5daedbeab771cefc1d7f4c5d772db3baa0b896fd.text_normalized: Stellar Industries sees the value you bring.

1f590d11efc1f64e6acb1776eb97623fa92f21d6.speaker: ECHO
1f590d11efc1f64e6acb1776eb97623fa92f21d6.text_raw: That goes both ways, faction benefits!
1f590d11efc1f64e6acb1776eb97623fa92f21d6.text_normalized: That goes both ways, faction benefits!

72fbb645df3d003b7c0278cbd8eb5f597b182c1c.speaker: Victor Hale
72fbb645df3d003b7c0278cbd8eb5f597b182c1c.text_raw: Definitely, if the results are positive we will both prosper.
72fbb645df3d003b7c0278cbd8eb5f597b182c1c.text_normalized: Definitely, if the results are positive we will both prosper.

1b709796b5995b96311626a3b4a013d7da2f6ab1.speaker: Victor Hale
1b709796b5995b96311626a3b4a013d7da2f6ab1.text_raw: Now, to the matter at hand. Our fleets are concentrated along the frontline systems and require constant reinforcement.
1b709796b5995b96311626a3b4a013d7da2f6ab1.text_normalized: Now, to the matter at hand. Our fleets are concentrated along the frontline systems and require constant reinforcement.

d229b32807a6a6e8bf1cc238e9b648698ba703aa.speaker: Victor Hale
d229b32807a6a6e8bf1cc238e9b648698ba703aa.text_raw: Go to the Conquest mission board to generate Fleet Strength. A wide variety of activities are available.
d229b32807a6a6e8bf1cc238e9b648698ba703aa.text_normalized: Go to the Conquest mission board to generate Fleet Strength. A wide variety of activities are available.

3bb0a6b89328486fe6501893d9e312acb80c2b81.speaker: Victor Hale
3bb0a6b89328486fe6501893d9e312acb80c2b81.text_raw: Direct assaults on enemy stations are also encouraged. This will decrease their Fleet Strength. Though your reputation with them will decline.
3bb0a6b89328486fe6501893d9e312acb80c2b81.text_normalized: Direct assaults on enemy stations are also encouraged. This will decrease their Fleet Strength. Though your reputation with them will decline.

729839ffc855becae690ab11ae5151b2eae75ddb.speaker: Victor Hale
729839ffc855becae690ab11ae5151b2eae75ddb.text_raw: We always play the long-term but for immediate results, we require 10 fleet strength.
729839ffc855becae690ab11ae5151b2eae75ddb.text_normalized: We always play the long-term but for immediate results, we require 10 fleet strength.

10f9e9fbe6ea706b5d0ea4b5fba8dc656b2b4f0d.speaker: Victor Hale
10f9e9fbe6ea706b5d0ea4b5fba8dc656b2b4f0d.text_raw: Your recent contributions will improve our frontline positions.
10f9e9fbe6ea706b5d0ea4b5fba8dc656b2b4f0d.text_normalized: Your recent contributions will improve our frontline positions.

9419a47c73c44f08a481872452c091f71d93c4f4.speaker: Victor Hale
9419a47c73c44f08a481872452c091f71d93c4f4.text_raw: Continued improvement will unlock further privileges.
9419a47c73c44f08a481872452c091f71d93c4f4.text_normalized: Continued improvement will unlock further privileges.

bb2b9cf8b754c1af7d6cc17f3ab594c500738c6b.speaker: Victor Hale
bb2b9cf8b754c1af7d6cc17f3ab594c500738c6b.text_raw: You can rise further in ranks, but what would really help is you aiding us in owning 30% of the sector.
bb2b9cf8b754c1af7d6cc17f3ab594c500738c6b.text_normalized: You can rise further in ranks, but what would really help is you aiding us in owning 30% of the sector.

c5fa42f2240b2b4da12c2add293d8c0004869b5e.speaker: ECHO
c5fa42f2240b2b4da12c2add293d8c0004869b5e.text_raw: Captain, I received a seemingly encrypted signal. It shows a message: ".tsoptuo ruo ot tropeR. noitnetta ruoy stseuqer larbmU.".
c5fa42f2240b2b4da12c2add293d8c0004869b5e.text_normalized: Captain, I received a seemingly encrypted signal. It shows a message: ".tsoptuo ruo ot tropeR. noitnetta ruoy stseuqer larbmU.".

de6847b880b09e0e203a31ca502162c38b5ddab2.speaker: ECHO
de6847b880b09e0e203a31ca502162c38b5ddab2.text_raw: I tried all decryption methods, but I can't make sense of it.
de6847b880b09e0e203a31ca502162c38b5ddab2.text_normalized: I tried all decryption methods, but I can't make sense of it.

5aa3cf99598cb3dc610aba9e4e497c9c1b213495.speaker: ECHO
5aa3cf99598cb3dc610aba9e4e497c9c1b213495.text_raw: You are a genius! I will mark the location of the outpost on the map.
5aa3cf99598cb3dc610aba9e4e497c9c1b213495.text_normalized: You are a genius! I will mark the location of the outpost on the map.

cecfe55a85b7b046873793b6d8dda91e38321bdd.speaker: Victor Hale
cecfe55a85b7b046873793b6d8dda91e38321bdd.text_raw: With your assistance, we now own over 30% of this sector.
cecfe55a85b7b046873793b6d8dda91e38321bdd.text_normalized: With your assistance, we now own over 30% of this sector.

40056e178c07cc68928b93e3fea1b52d34fa8efa.speaker: Victor Hale
40056e178c07cc68928b93e3fea1b52d34fa8efa.text_raw: I do have some feedback, but that can wait.
40056e178c07cc68928b93e3fea1b52d34fa8efa.text_normalized: I do have some feedback, but that can wait.

1139ae3ae9dc1ca1dfefc3231fe0edf500f008f7.speaker: Victor Hale
1139ae3ae9dc1ca1dfefc3231fe0edf500f008f7.text_raw: We need to hold this momemtum, and keep growing!
1139ae3ae9dc1ca1dfefc3231fe0edf500f008f7.text_normalized: We need to hold this momemtum, and keep growing!

d47fbef7a39972dcc932d6b422069f6bd55d11eb.speaker: ECHO
d47fbef7a39972dcc932d6b422069f6bd55d11eb.text_raw: Captain, we may continue supporting Stellar Industries. However, we remain free to assist other factions, including smaller factions.
d47fbef7a39972dcc932d6b422069f6bd55d11eb.text_normalized: Captain, we may continue supporting Stellar Industries. However, we remain free to assist other factions, including smaller factions.

a69acd39c0fc667a630c4ce2c2b35c40b3d14fff.speaker: ECHO
a69acd39c0fc667a630c4ce2c2b35c40b3d14fff.text_raw: There is also a new message we recieved, it's... someone from the Darkspace Compact. You should know him, it's Midas.
a69acd39c0fc667a630c4ce2c2b35c40b3d14fff.text_normalized: There is also a new message we recieved, it's, someone from the Darkspace Compact. You should know him, it's Midas.

b8531814bac95cbfd957ee2ca46b23ef8e06d003.speaker: ECHO
b8531814bac95cbfd957ee2ca46b23ef8e06d003.text_raw: He asks that you meet with him. I've marked the location on your map.
b8531814bac95cbfd957ee2ca46b23ef8e06d003.text_normalized: He asks that you meet with him. I've marked the location on your map.

feb84dbe7fa19abaa0c6d29799f5c19bbf79d45e.speaker: ECHO
feb84dbe7fa19abaa0c6d29799f5c19bbf79d45e.text_raw: Historical records confirm. This is Nikita Kolyatov's offspring.
feb84dbe7fa19abaa0c6d29799f5c19bbf79d45e.text_normalized: Historical records confirm. This is Nikita Kolyatov's offspring.

216f9c05a3ffd2db501a3ff3d074ebe8ea253f15.speaker: ECHO
216f9c05a3ffd2db501a3ff3d074ebe8ea253f15.text_raw: Captain, we may continue assisting the Kolyatov. However, we remain free to support other factions, including minor factions.
216f9c05a3ffd2db501a3ff3d074ebe8ea253f15.text_normalized: Captain, we may continue assisting the Kolyatov. However, we remain free to support other factions, including minor factions.

bdcf09406c4e02fb774d27f9f9c0911a99e04207.speaker: Arle
bdcf09406c4e02fb774d27f9f9c0911a99e04207.text_raw: You are our enemy, improve your standing with us at once!
bdcf09406c4e02fb774d27f9f9c0911a99e04207.text_normalized: You are our enemy, improve your standing with us at once!

a85aa7b2ae160809790276e19b79cfa1f778f438.speaker: Arle
a85aa7b2ae160809790276e19b79cfa1f778f438.text_raw: We somehow lost our headquarters. Return when we build another one.
a85aa7b2ae160809790276e19b79cfa1f778f438.text_normalized: We somehow lost our headquarters. Return when we build another one.

5b6b8d0e89eaa234a6a661e2f6655691551344c3.speaker: Arle
5b6b8d0e89eaa234a6a661e2f6655691551344c3.text_raw: The Oracle sensed your arrival, Captain.
5b6b8d0e89eaa234a6a661e2f6655691551344c3.text_normalized: The Oracle sensed your arrival, Captain.

3631447116fcedf35b965550182142301f8240a6.speaker: Arle
3631447116fcedf35b965550182142301f8240a6.text_raw: Yes, we are in need of more Drone Power. And, in order to build more drones, we need resources.
3631447116fcedf35b965550182142301f8240a6.text_normalized: Yes, we are in need of more Drone Power. And, in order to build more drones, we need resources.

f60cca4961c7ce69fdff7765f12d9b2a882b7332.speaker: Arle
f60cca4961c7ce69fdff7765f12d9b2a882b7332.text_raw: The Oracle has taken an interest in you.
f60cca4961c7ce69fdff7765f12d9b2a882b7332.text_normalized: The Oracle has taken an interest in you.

7e03b28832181f0f589583427cff4f9975be3608.speaker: Arle
7e03b28832181f0f589583427cff4f9975be3608.text_raw: It sees potential. Potential to transcend, to align yourself with the Oracle.

af04ebc93fa3ed1994b1e024ff93ee70b335a49a.text_raw: Simple, you go to any point of interest that we post on the patrol board, and eliminate any hostile forces that you encounter. Then you collect your reward, rinse, and repeat. Interested?
af04ebc93fa3ed1994b1e024ff93ee70b335a49a.text_normalized: Simple, you go to any point of interest that we post on the patrol board, and eliminate any hostile forces that you encounter. Then you collect your reward, rinse, and repeat. Interested?

94fb0312a179f558bf0aab8cccfcf9c8db44cb38.text_raw: Now that you're a bona fide expert, how about you hone your skills some more? The shops around here are always looking for more refined materials, and you might even make something useful for yourself.

9b36f875034802ca34161ebbcc373a63884bc458.text_normalized: You done at the forge yet?

431fda0dd23f07d88fdab164c4f269807cc66f35.text_raw: I don't believe it. You want to know what it's like to be a Forgemaster? You, with those flabby arms? I doubt you've ever even held a hammer before!

ec6e22803617137bf856430bda2caf584c9f85bf.text_normalized: Good to see you, initiate. I see you have taken to the life of a Drone whisperer.

7de23cff4252b0fea64d3e69fe8078d6dfb24f99.text_raw: A big pirate raid disrupted most of the system, and we're still dealing with the fallout. We'd be grateful if you could help out.
7de23cff4252b0fea64d3e69fe8078d6dfb24f99.text_normalized: A big pirate raid disrupted most of the system, and we're still dealing with the fallout. We'd be grateful if you could help out.

46b246f2bdc44a21dc135a4b5cbee9ae0a66a179.speaker: ECHO
46b246f2bdc44a21dc135a4b5cbee9ae0a66a179.text_raw: Captain, we have to wait until a game update releases for this mission to continue.
46b246f2bdc44a21dc135a4b5cbee9ae0a66a179.text_normalized: Captain, we have to wait until a game update releases for this mission to continue.

14250da0ae136bbe67421d355054b8ab8d0d6900.speaker: James Fleddon
14250da0ae136bbe67421d355054b8ab8d0d6900.text_raw: I've got a job for you in the next sector.
14250da0ae136bbe67421d355054b8ab8d0d6900.text_normalized: I've got a job for you in the next sector.

54886b6cdcf9405495ddcef68e35b88f95639da4.speaker: James Fleddon
54886b6cdcf9405495ddcef68e35b88f95639da4.text_raw: Since I can't really leave here, we'll fork over some good credits.
54886b6cdcf9405495ddcef68e35b88f95639da4.text_normalized: Since I can't really leave here, we'll fork over some good credits.

0cce10f5342f355ea39a8cf54a2a7274ec09e446.speaker: James Fleddon
0cce10f5342f355ea39a8cf54a2a7274ec09e446.text_raw: Anyways, I lost contact with an associate of mine, and I want you to do his job.
0cce10f5342f355ea39a8cf54a2a7274ec09e446.text_normalized: Anyways, I lost contact with an associate of mine, and I want you to do his job.

1026892870206a22c5355ec775c90cbd83726541.speaker: James Fleddon
1026892870206a22c5355ec775c90cbd83726541.text_raw: Go to one of our stations in Sector
1026892870206a22c5355ec775c90cbd83726541.text_normalized: Go to one of our stations in Sector

cbf46c40379386066a20afa5d98109cbd48f5410.speaker: James Fleddon
cbf46c40379386066a20afa5d98109cbd48f5410.text_raw: Some pirates are attacking one of our outposts, can you rush over there and help them out?
cbf46c40379386066a20afa5d98109cbd48f5410.text_normalized: Some pirates are attacking one of our outposts, can you rush over there and help them out?

77973959559d500bd216995e2f0d09f6e8ba5bf1.speaker: James Fleddon
77973959559d500bd216995e2f0d09f6e8ba5bf1.text_raw: Afterwards go to one of our stations, and they'll give you more info about our missing associate.
77973959559d500bd216995e2f0d09f6e8ba5bf1.text_normalized: Afterwards go to one of our stations, and they'll give you more info about our missing associate.

6bd5c4b06ff49d1c10978dd28e737f216dd5f1ab.speaker: Claude
6bd5c4b06ff49d1c10978dd28e737f216dd5f1ab.text_raw: Wouldn't have our outpost anymore if it wasn't for you.
6bd5c4b06ff49d1c10978dd28e737f216dd5f1ab.text_normalized: Wouldn't have our outpost anymore if it wasn't for you.

8643883bc94dd4db908a433bac2d84b9f54ee71c.speaker: Claude
8643883bc94dd4db908a433bac2d84b9f54ee71c.text_raw: Let's get you your next mission. The one that pays quite a bit.
8643883bc94dd4db908a433bac2d84b9f54ee71c.text_normalized: Let's get you your next mission. The one that pays quite a bit.

890988ce0374ea0888dea1816a4c976ae2ca4357.speaker: Claude
890988ce0374ea0888dea1816a4c976ae2ca4357.text_raw: Just some... regular cargo we need you to bring over there.
890988ce0374ea0888dea1816a4c976ae2ca4357.text_normalized: Just some, regular cargo we need you to bring over there.

be3b67e76a93e39aa9e1111cf9ec999a34a6fe17.speaker: Claude
be3b67e76a93e39aa9e1111cf9ec999a34a6fe17.text_raw: Nothing too fancy, just don't go snooping around the cargo.
be3b67e76a93e39aa9e1111cf9ec999a34a6fe17.text_normalized: Nothing too fancy, just don't go snooping around the cargo.

b357d93403db9f93f46ba4a6edf60935e878f55d.speaker: Stella Chion
b357d93403db9f93f46ba4a6edf60935e878f55d.text_raw: Good thing you knew, I was about to terminate you.
b357d93403db9f93f46ba4a6edf60935e878f55d.text_normalized: Good thing you knew, I was about to terminate you.

05f66b01f77e8bf1643298369a18e556bb5946e6.speaker: Stella Chion
05f66b01f77e8bf1643298369a18e556bb5946e6.text_raw: Sure, you brought some construction materials for
05f66b01f77e8bf1643298369a18e556bb5946e6.text_normalized: Sure, you brought some construction materials for

57736f4d520dc941f7c95a321658af8c1e57ca2f.speaker: Stella Chion
57736f4d520dc941f7c95a321658af8c1e57ca2f.text_raw: We do quite a bit of trading with them. So, from time to time, they grant us access through their wormholes.
57736f4d520dc941f7c95a321658af8c1e57ca2f.text_normalized: We do quite a bit of trading with them. So, from time to time, they grant us access through their wormholes.

ac7b8ba65faf7d019307b791af4f179c858183b7.speaker: Stella Chion
ac7b8ba65faf7d019307b791af4f179c858183b7.text_raw: New tech, blueprints, faction weaponry, high-grade crafting materials. You know, the normal stuff.
ac7b8ba65faf7d019307b791af4f179c858183b7.text_normalized: New tech, blueprints, faction weaponry, high-grade crafting materials. You know, the normal stuff.

c41640d1c2ae0778016d11ebb3b51a23b468c553.speaker: Stella Chion
c41640d1c2ae0778016d11ebb3b51a23b468c553.text_raw: We have a new job for you, helping with some more important cargo now.
c41640d1c2ae0778016d11ebb3b51a23b468c553.text_normalized: We have a new job for you, helping with some more important cargo now.

fb289e83016c7373abdab51a1fe4dac334ed288b.speaker: Stella Chion
fb289e83016c7373abdab51a1fe4dac334ed288b.text_raw: Go to the provided waypoint and talk to your contact. I'll provide the contact details. Goodbye, Captain.
fb289e83016c7373abdab51a1fe4dac334ed288b.text_normalized: Go to the provided waypoint and talk to your contact. I'll provide the contact details. Goodbye, Captain.

42e8854d1c8b2deaf096aacd224cde0ef7075424.speaker: James Fleddon
42e8854d1c8b2deaf096aacd224cde0ef7075424.text_raw: Well, I can, but I just can't be that visible, so I have to take my time.
42e8854d1c8b2deaf096aacd224cde0ef7075424.text_normalized: Well, I can, but I just can't be that visible, so I have to take my time.

c53bd00f4d5b3295dd229499f21e6940ea9d3509.speaker: James Fleddon
c53bd00f4d5b3295dd229499f21e6940ea9d3509.text_raw: We would appreciate your assistance, escorting one of our cargo vessels.
c53bd00f4d5b3295dd229499f21e6940ea9d3509.text_normalized: We would appreciate your assistance, escorting one of our cargo vessels.

bfde5cd31d8a305a4ff1656229efca68559a132e.speaker: James Fleddon
bfde5cd31d8a305a4ff1656229efca68559a132e.text_raw: We think the pirates are waiting at the cargo depot. Hurry over there!
bfde5cd31d8a305a4ff1656229efca68559a132e.text_normalized: We think the pirates are waiting at the cargo depot. Hurry over there!

405e7c5b96ce734fdb4caaefd4132c8987256911.speaker: James Fleddon
405e7c5b96ce734fdb4caaefd4132c8987256911.text_raw: What do you mean well done, Claude?
405e7c5b96ce734fdb4caaefd4132c8987256911.text_normalized: What do you mean well done, Claude?

298061c0e53091bf7b0b9a9d3d08cbc3b6b6f6f5.speaker: Claude
298061c0e53091bf7b0b9a9d3d08cbc3b6b6f6f5.text_raw: No, James... Ah, I guess you've earned our trust, Captain.
298061c0e53091bf7b0b9a9d3d08cbc3b6b6f6f5.text_normalized: No, James. Ah, I guess you've earned our trust, Captain.

861a569ee2a1e331ce390813ac3cf8c95bffb9e9.speaker: Claude
861a569ee2a1e331ce390813ac3cf8c95bffb9e9.text_raw: You were protecting a shipment full of Metafiber, at least that should have been in there.
861a569ee2a1e331ce390813ac3cf8c95bffb9e9.text_normalized: You were protecting a shipment full of Metafiber, at least that should have been in there.

e156f08bda8a25414f1a1ceea4d5f37573dd4dee.speaker: ECHO
e156f08bda8a25414f1a1ceea4d5f37573dd4dee.text_raw: Metafiber, that's not a substance known to me Captain.
e156f08bda8a25414f1a1ceea4d5f37573dd4dee.text_normalized: Metafiber, that's not a substance known to me Captain.

696c571840f7060558938f50dcecc2673dd2c748.speaker: Claude
696c571840f7060558938f50dcecc2673dd2c748.text_raw: Well, that would require more time to explain. Right now, we need to get after the missing shipment.
696c571840f7060558938f50dcecc2673dd2c748.text_normalized: Well, that would require more time to explain. Right now, we need to get after the missing shipment.

c43ca224215f8a3a3e575efd885df96f9e63c816.speaker: Claude
c43ca224215f8a3a3e575efd885df96f9e63c816.text_raw: I see.. well you're going to meet them.
c43ca224215f8a3a3e575efd885df96f9e63c816.text_normalized: I see, well you're going to meet them.

11c3d0c53c489d5b69b9231dd96873bad3fce5ae.speaker: Claude
11c3d0c53c489d5b69b9231dd96873bad3fce5ae.text_raw: They are our suppliers, so our best bet is to see what they know.
11c3d0c53c489d5b69b9231dd96873bad3fce5ae.text_normalized: They are our suppliers, so our best bet is to see what they know.

d409122da8cce3ce776cce237b021bd2237abea5.speaker: Claude
d409122da8cce3ce776cce237b021bd2237abea5.text_raw: Head over to one of their hideouts, and ask where the shipment is.
d409122da8cce3ce776cce237b021bd2237abea5.text_normalized: Head over to one of their hideouts, and ask where the shipment is.

38f8176615c8dadee0252505519940e812405e40.speaker: Claude
38f8176615c8dadee0252505519940e812405e40.text_raw: I know what you are thinking, and yes that's possible... but you are more than capable from what we've seen.
38f8176615c8dadee0252505519940e812405e40.text_normalized: I know what you are thinking, and yes that's possible, but you are more than capable from what we've seen.

151fa7052040c43805771fc0907984aca9f6dad4.speaker: James Fleddon
151fa7052040c43805771fc0907984aca9f6dad4.text_raw: Passphrase...? Yes, you should use "Hello, I'm looking for the missing Metafiber shipment we paid you for!!"
151fa7052040c43805771fc0907984aca9f6dad4.text_normalized: Passphrase, ? Yes, you should use "Hello, I'm looking for the missing Metafiber shipment we paid you for!!"

f97eb1b250073325ab1e8d92f12c3ff4256662da.speaker: Claude
f97eb1b250073325ab1e8d92f12c3ff4256662da.text_raw: James, relax. Captain, I believe you'll manage, bring the shipment back here to James.
f97eb1b250073325ab1e8d92f12c3ff4256662da.text_normalized: James, relax. Captain, I believe you'll manage, bring the shipment back here to James.

16e07342d179d70148dd0b82cf0f54176fdc6a5b.speaker: James Fleddon
16e07342d179d70148dd0b82cf0f54176fdc6a5b.text_raw: This didn't go as planned Captain, luckily that was one of the decoy freighters.
16e07342d179d70148dd0b82cf0f54176fdc6a5b.text_normalized: This didn't go as planned Captain, luckily that was one of the decoy freighters.

e0c9ac15da172a56add2033b940a199b0ed1751a.speaker: James Fleddon
e0c9ac15da172a56add2033b940a199b0ed1751a.text_raw: The real one is coming in now, go there and escort it to the cargo depot.
e0c9ac15da172a56add2033b940a199b0ed1751a.text_normalized: The real one is coming in now, go there and escort it to the cargo depot.

b60fe9f91b14c542f3bfdd37880e5a80201364dd.speaker: Midas
b60fe9f91b14c542f3bfdd37880e5a80201364dd.text_raw: Listen... someone went rogue within our outfit and we suspect he took the Metafiber.
b60fe9f91b14c542f3bfdd37880e5a80201364dd.text_normalized: Listen, someone went rogue within our outfit and we suspect he took the Metafiber.

beab3955035992c5fe77766225d82b039ff8201b.speaker: Midas
beab3955035992c5fe77766225d82b039ff8201b.text_raw: We will give you his location since we don't need any more enemies.
beab3955035992c5fe77766225d82b039ff8201b.text_normalized: We will give you his location since we don't need any more enemies.

6336d69dc5df396c71eecc3573d24b48ef4fc73c.speaker: Midas
6336d69dc5df396c71eecc3573d24b48ef4fc73c.text_raw: It's difficult as is with the current factions knocking at our doors. And not to mention... ah nevermind.
6336d69dc5df396c71eecc3573d24b48ef4fc73c.text_normalized: It's difficult as is with the current factions knocking at our doors. And not to mention, ah nevermind.

d8d940541d92f96389e2e3b862e2244c87445683.speaker: Midas
d8d940541d92f96389e2e3b862e2244c87445683.text_raw: ...so we wouldn't mind you taking out these bastards, you'd gain some goodwill with us as well.
d8d940541d92f96389e2e3b862e2244c87445683.text_normalized: , so we wouldn't mind you taking out these bastards, you'd gain some goodwill with us as well.

b2808325c3d60ef1663311f1380f6431f07232cc.speaker: Midas
b2808325c3d60ef1663311f1380f6431f07232cc.text_raw: You don't know the reason why you are here? And why your galaxy invaded ours?
b2808325c3d60ef1663311f1380f6431f07232cc.text_normalized: You don't know the reason why you are here? And why your galaxy invaded ours?

dc995aa5a58fbf05509bebc77bae929185270dc3.speaker: Midas
dc995aa5a58fbf05509bebc77bae929185270dc3.text_raw: To get your hands on Metafiber, to gain control over it.
dc995aa5a58fbf05509bebc77bae929185270dc3.text_normalized: To get your hands on Metafiber, to gain control over it.

a01f96cc405c47a2453b96839118167e93bbd622.speaker: Midas
a01f96cc405c47a2453b96839118167e93bbd622.text_raw: Well, you most definitely are involved, even if you don't know it.
a01f96cc405c47a2453b96839118167e93bbd622.text_normalized: Well, you most definitely are involved, even if you don't know it.

2bf062fb3a1a9c4d4c956f85e0b1cdf5ee98b7c0.speaker: Midas
2bf062fb3a1a9c4d4c956f85e0b1cdf5ee98b7c0.text_raw: Listen, Metafiber is probably our most valuable commodity, and judging by the return of your galaxy to ours, it's also yours.
2bf062fb3a1a9c4d4c956f85e0b1cdf5ee98b7c0.text_normalized: Listen, Metafiber is probably our most valuable commodity, and judging by the return of your galaxy to ours, it's also yours.

df2653ddc3ccc0c87c8bc7cbee0a353f02a3a4d0.speaker: Midas
df2653ddc3ccc0c87c8bc7cbee0a353f02a3a4d0.text_raw: Metafiber is mainly used in cybernetics, which in turn prolongs our lives quite significantly.
df2653ddc3ccc0c87c8bc7cbee0a353f02a3a4d0.text_normalized: Metafiber is mainly used in cybernetics, which in turn prolongs our lives quite significantly.

700365cd6bd01901f5b70bb5043481e1b31d1665.speaker: Midas
700365cd6bd01901f5b70bb5043481e1b31d1665.text_raw: It has more uses, but I won't get into it here.
700365cd6bd01901f5b70bb5043481e1b31d1665.text_normalized: It has more uses, but I won't get into it here.

d13680128730cba279abe851f943c45cb39ea532.speaker: Midas
d13680128730cba279abe851f943c45cb39ea532.text_raw: Go to the location I just send you, and best of luck, milky.
d13680128730cba279abe851f943c45cb39ea532.text_normalized: Go to the location I just send you, and best of luck, milky.

3c41d6d8e7eda2b39f30b1077ec38d973f9c0633.speaker: James Fleddon
3c41d6d8e7eda2b39f30b1077ec38d973f9c0633.text_raw: How'd you get all that Metafiber back?
3c41d6d8e7eda2b39f30b1077ec38d973f9c0633.text_normalized: How'd you get all that Metafiber back?

2ad68fae023e51ddd64872bd6813000b20b06564.speaker: James Fleddon
2ad68fae023e51ddd64872bd6813000b20b06564.text_raw: That makes sense... You did bring 1 too many Metafiber boxes with you.
2ad68fae023e51ddd64872bd6813000b20b06564.text_normalized: That makes sense. You did bring 1 too many Metafiber boxes with you.

a69e31bec3fe5b1cc845591f5482970a8fe82e03.speaker: James Fleddon
a69e31bec3fe5b1cc845591f5482970a8fe82e03.text_raw: As a gesture of good will we'll let you keep that one.
a69e31bec3fe5b1cc845591f5482970a8fe82e03.text_normalized: As a gesture of good will we'll let you keep that one.

e0d1233e48549ffce4bb902359c22f4cd9b88e8f.speaker: James Fleddon
e0d1233e48549ffce4bb902359c22f4cd9b88e8f.text_raw: That's worth a lot more then some measly credits, just so you know.
e0d1233e48549ffce4bb902359c22f4cd9b88e8f.text_normalized: That's worth a lot more then some measly credits, just so you know.

2d595be701c48a7e2040dd932d7340839941f181.speaker: James Fleddon
2d595be701c48a7e2040dd932d7340839941f181.text_raw: Guessing they rather keep you as a friend, then an enemy.
2d595be701c48a7e2040dd932d7340839941f181.text_normalized: Guessing they rather keep you as a friend, then an enemy.

244f7781bca522d084dbcddddb83b81362309abc.speaker: James Fleddon
244f7781bca522d084dbcddddb83b81362309abc.text_raw: Captain, just some advice... don't go telling everyone you have it, it's highly illegal and highly sought after.
244f7781bca522d084dbcddddb83b81362309abc.text_normalized: Captain, just some advice, don't go telling everyone you have it, it's highly illegal and highly sought after.

c985694083918d75c2f67fa13f539df18ca0c9ec.speaker: ECHO
c985694083918d75c2f67fa13f539df18ca0c9ec.text_raw: Captain, we received a message from our mysterious employer. I'll play it back.
c985694083918d75c2f67fa13f539df18ca0c9ec.text_normalized: Captain, we received a message from our mysterious employer. I'll play it back.

a12479c2a257e12cd7e1a4d3f3bad8f449a70f0d.speaker: ECHO
a12479c2a257e12cd7e1a4d3f3bad8f449a70f0d.text_raw: I've added the location to your mission overview. You can choose which mission we will do first.
a12479c2a257e12cd7e1a4d3f3bad8f449a70f0d.text_normalized: I've added the location to your mission overview. You can choose which mission we will do first.

b53196ed0191f6953885e77ed8510d43b6151755.speaker: Unknown Contact
b53196ed0191f6953885e77ed8510d43b6151755.text_raw: Captain, good of you to show up.
b53196ed0191f6953885e77ed8510d43b6151755.text_normalized: Captain, good of you to show up.

03616a83335e63aacc8aa3752e938828e0580743.speaker: Unknown Contact
03616a83335e63aacc8aa3752e938828e0580743.text_raw: Something tells me you found something of value.
03616a83335e63aacc8aa3752e938828e0580743.text_normalized: Something tells me you found something of value.

b854e2e5194ebec7153aa9522a40ce47e7c3008e.speaker: Unknown Contact
b854e2e5194ebec7153aa9522a40ce47e7c3008e.text_raw: It's our job to know, Captain...
b854e2e5194ebec7153aa9522a40ce47e7c3008e.text_normalized: It's our job to know, Captain.

23e5149a4484f383c94d096957c7988b3aa3e374.speaker: Unknown Contact
23e5149a4484f383c94d096957c7988b3aa3e374.text_raw: And whenever Metafiber comes into play, we work overtime.
23e5149a4484f383c94d096957c7988b3aa3e374.text_normalized: And whenever Metafiber comes into play, we work overtime.

39ea63609690d1276c3c5957f259166173503bc8.speaker: Unknown Contact
39ea63609690d1276c3c5957f259166173503bc8.text_raw: We have been trying to get our hands on it since we got here.
39ea63609690d1276c3c5957f259166173503bc8.text_normalized: We have been trying to get our hands on it since we got here.

3c85f1e24aa2e6ccfb83dddbe4cce30de657dd0a.speaker: Unknown Contact
3c85f1e24aa2e6ccfb83dddbe4cce30de657dd0a.text_raw: We want to study it, run some experiments on it.
3c85f1e24aa2e6ccfb83dddbe4cce30de657dd0a.text_normalized: We want to study it, run some experiments on it.

bae51aa6520a5c27aeeae28fb26bbb6f84dab293.speaker: Unknown Contact
bae51aa6520a5c27aeeae28fb26bbb6f84dab293.text_raw: Well, yes.. But it's a lot more, we suspect.
bae51aa6520a5c27aeeae28fb26bbb6f84dab293.text_normalized: Well, yes. But it's a lot more, we suspect.

99073e8a0ed501f78fae1c37acd2380fb260e38d.speaker: Unknown Contact
99073e8a0ed501f78fae1c37acd2380fb260e38d.text_raw: I want you to craft a specialized chamber to study this Metafiber.
99073e8a0ed501f78fae1c37acd2380fb260e38d.text_normalized: I want you to craft a specialized chamber to study this Metafiber.

17ab5742a5f26065350d6fb880790128fd45ae44.speaker: Unknown Contact
17ab5742a5f26065350d6fb880790128fd45ae44.text_raw: Don't worry, we'll only use a small portion of it, it'll stay yours.
17ab5742a5f26065350d6fb880790128fd45ae44.text_normalized: Don't worry, we'll only use a small portion of it, it'll stay yours.

7c453e82199498c24dfa9bdef46660a423354d95.speaker: Unknown Contact
7c453e82199498c24dfa9bdef46660a423354d95.text_raw: Then bring the item to the location attached in the mission.
7c453e82199498c24dfa9bdef46660a423354d95.text_normalized: Then bring the item to the location attached in the mission.

7adda364629430e41035174d9cd7f63c8c38f96d.speaker: Stella Chion
7adda364629430e41035174d9cd7f63c8c38f96d.text_raw: I'm with anyone who pays well.
7adda364629430e41035174d9cd7f63c8c38f96d.text_normalized: I'm with anyone who pays well.

56e71f041f712bce04aee3b9db07d72996440e0c.speaker: Stella Chion
56e71f041f712bce04aee3b9db07d72996440e0c.text_raw: Start unloading the Chamber, and we'll install it here.
56e71f041f712bce04aee3b9db07d72996440e0c.text_normalized: Start unloading the Chamber, and we'll install it here.

e979c52f52c9d6d92297d79e99d70a499437a380.speaker: Stella Chion
e979c52f52c9d6d92297d79e99d70a499437a380.text_raw: I'll take a small sample of the Metafiber as well...
e979c52f52c9d6d92297d79e99d70a499437a380.text_normalized: I'll take a small sample of the Metafiber as well.

6416ce23c1d8a80b8d47fcc84b1590288f6c941f.speaker: Stella Chion
6416ce23c1d8a80b8d47fcc84b1590288f6c941f.text_raw: They'll run some tests, meanwhile I've been told you need to meet our employer again.
6416ce23c1d8a80b8d47fcc84b1590288f6c941f.text_normalized: They'll run some tests, meanwhile I've been told you need to meet our employer again.

561809c6238a608d74a36619262f70591a9c87f7.speaker: Unknown Contact
561809c6238a608d74a36619262f70591a9c87f7.text_raw: Captain, I have to say.. We are very pleased with your help.
561809c6238a608d74a36619262f70591a9c87f7.text_normalized: Captain, I have to say. We are very pleased with your help.

be7b6003dd93cab533d233b873a7ea6e3dfdd281.speaker: Unknown Contact
be7b6003dd93cab533d233b873a7ea6e3dfdd281.text_raw: Even though this work is still somewhat within your contract.
be7b6003dd93cab533d233b873a7ea6e3dfdd281.text_normalized: Even though this work is still somewhat within your contract.

6382bc0ff568eb179a7333a7555fc89b49634531.speaker: Unknown Contact
6382bc0ff568eb179a7333a7555fc89b49634531.text_raw: It's time to fully entrust you with who we are, and what we are doing here.
6382bc0ff568eb179a7333a7555fc89b49634531.text_normalized: It's time to fully entrust you with who we are, and what we are doing here.

a95e4e28fee390218c9c213b229c262c12e363a3.speaker: Umbral
a95e4e28fee390218c9c213b229c262c12e363a3.text_raw: From now on, you can refer to me as just
a95e4e28fee390218c9c213b229c262c12e363a3.text_normalized: From now on, you can refer to me as just

85ff20297cfb119aa282b6e2cbac419027a00f58.speaker: Umbral
85ff20297cfb119aa282b6e2cbac419027a00f58.text_raw: So... Remember that Command Cortex you got back from the
85ff20297cfb119aa282b6e2cbac419027a00f58.text_normalized: So. Remember that Command Cortex you got back from the

4879489fd3abef6a91468236c06718424293d5c3.speaker: Umbral
4879489fd3abef6a91468236c06718424293d5c3.text_raw: The Command Cortex will take over the station's AI, which will give us total command.
4879489fd3abef6a91468236c06718424293d5c3.text_normalized: The Command Cortex will take over the station's AI, which will give us total command.

78e5efc1ad4eee6432a55a06c1acf05285df363e.speaker: Umbral
78e5efc1ad4eee6432a55a06c1acf05285df363e.text_raw: No hostilities should arise from this,
78e5efc1ad4eee6432a55a06c1acf05285df363e.text_normalized: No hostilities should arise from this,

ff61775dee14ffed2e9019358a5f587d515daf1a.speaker: Umbral
ff61775dee14ffed2e9019358a5f587d515daf1a.text_raw: We do not want to make any enemies at this stage.
ff61775dee14ffed2e9019358a5f587d515daf1a.text_normalized: We do not want to make any enemies at this stage.

e50f832dac89cc5cb6651109d291595669ca915c.speaker: Stella Chion
e50f832dac89cc5cb6651109d291595669ca915c.text_raw: Captain, I've already ensured they won't detect anything.
e50f832dac89cc5cb6651109d291595669ca915c.text_normalized: Captain, I've already ensured they won't detect anything.

1f778f0d58ac00a49a1efa3b7351821c67b121b1.speaker: Stella Chion
1f778f0d58ac00a49a1efa3b7351821c67b121b1.text_raw: They've already switched allegiances, seeing as
1f778f0d58ac00a49a1efa3b7351821c67b121b1.text_normalized: They've already switched allegiances, seeing as

c522e56d3f34ba875d321c35cd4f62c026413fe7.speaker: Stella Chion
c522e56d3f34ba875d321c35cd4f62c026413fe7.text_raw: Looks like it worked, quite effectively as well.
c522e56d3f34ba875d321c35cd4f62c026413fe7.text_normalized: Looks like it worked, quite effectively as well.

4e393192175603d4729afa8dbd51f59ba6308a55.speaker: Stella Chion
4e393192175603d4729afa8dbd51f59ba6308a55.text_raw: Yes, that's it. The Command Cortex has it's energy fully depleted.
4e393192175603d4729afa8dbd51f59ba6308a55.text_normalized: Yes, that's it. The Command Cortex has it's energy fully depleted.

cff13bdecaa3aedfa6d7180c2b7eff3805f35f93.speaker: Stella Chion
cff13bdecaa3aedfa6d7180c2b7eff3805f35f93.text_raw: I'm setting up a beacon here so you can contact
cff13bdecaa3aedfa6d7180c2b7eff3805f35f93.text_normalized: I'm setting up a beacon here so you can contact

6f3a4ce613bdf26f232786d20b55bcf08263b080.speaker: Umbral
6f3a4ce613bdf26f232786d20b55bcf08263b080.text_raw: Captain, we meet not in the cold of space but within our new station.
6f3a4ce613bdf26f232786d20b55bcf08263b080.text_normalized: Captain, we meet not in the cold of space but within our new station.

ab16192752f0aaa5aa690e5f725d9dc3bf3b9cba.speaker: Umbral
ab16192752f0aaa5aa690e5f725d9dc3bf3b9cba.text_raw: Let's tell you about the experiments we ran.
ab16192752f0aaa5aa690e5f725d9dc3bf3b9cba.text_normalized: Let's tell you about the experiments we ran.

2252d8440ad5cdea35e157f899aa2d7b4372ac8c.speaker: Umbral
2252d8440ad5cdea35e157f899aa2d7b4372ac8c.text_raw: Some most disturbing but yet very exciting finds.
2252d8440ad5cdea35e157f899aa2d7b4372ac8c.text_normalized: Some most disturbing but yet very exciting finds.

48bf550a942ecbdb02e4c49cf69113145622b09c.speaker: Umbral
48bf550a942ecbdb02e4c49cf69113145622b09c.text_raw: I won't bore you with all the details, but this underlined the importance of pushing further.
48bf550a942ecbdb02e4c49cf69113145622b09c.text_normalized: I won't bore you with all the details, but this underlined the importance of pushing further.

df26b2198b3f803d7a9536100bafd27c5c438d28.speaker: ECHO
df26b2198b3f803d7a9536100bafd27c5c438d28.text_raw: He really hasn't given you any details, Captain.
df26b2198b3f803d7a9536100bafd27c5c438d28.text_normalized: He really hasn't given you any details, Captain.

fd8810561b4ae1ea898b0911d7af8b0f92e28bf0.speaker: Umbral
fd8810561b4ae1ea898b0911d7af8b0f92e28bf0.text_raw: I've already ordered the construction fleet to move out. They are moving towards a system to construct a gate into the Darkspace.
fd8810561b4ae1ea898b0911d7af8b0f92e28bf0.text_normalized: I've already ordered the construction fleet to move out. They are moving towards a system to construct a gate into the Darkspace.

2f4a44725e7c75446dbf69914dbbce6a0c267412.speaker: Umbral
2f4a44725e7c75446dbf69914dbbce6a0c267412.text_raw: We are however getting reports of drones being wiped out halting our efforts.
2f4a44725e7c75446dbf69914dbbce6a0c267412.text_normalized: We are however getting reports of drones being wiped out halting our efforts.

cbca9769fa9b7a2d42d3a216b173cd44d8c4ebc5.speaker: Umbral
cbca9769fa9b7a2d42d3a216b173cd44d8c4ebc5.text_raw: Not your mere pirates, this seems to be a different faction altogether.
cbca9769fa9b7a2d42d3a216b173cd44d8c4ebc5.text_normalized: Not your mere pirates, this seems to be a different faction altogether.

aa663e8ed543cb725da6d46bcfa57eef68de7a4d.speaker: Umbral
aa663e8ed543cb725da6d46bcfa57eef68de7a4d.text_raw: I need you to assist the system in their preparations.
aa663e8ed543cb725da6d46bcfa57eef68de7a4d.text_normalized: I need you to assist the system in their preparations.

00bbbeb34b9e77849a2fb72517f342c4f69b0042.speaker: Umbral
00bbbeb34b9e77849a2fb72517f342c4f69b0042.text_raw: The supplies were lost under your watch, Captain.
00bbbeb34b9e77849a2fb72517f342c4f69b0042.text_normalized: The supplies were lost under your watch, Captain.

2060f50a49bc2a866fd18d69806f51f6deee54d0.speaker: Umbral
2060f50a49bc2a866fd18d69806f51f6deee54d0.text_raw: A fresh batch is on its way. This time, don't give our enemies a reason to celebrate.
2060f50a49bc2a866fd18d69806f51f6deee54d0.text_normalized: A fresh batch is on its way. This time, don't give our enemies a reason to celebrate.

d6c42f7b7758620918f136584c6830b87cce377b.speaker: Umbral
d6c42f7b7758620918f136584c6830b87cce377b.text_raw: These Meridia's Chosen, we've tried contacting them, offering them good credits, but to no avail.
d6c42f7b7758620918f136584c6830b87cce377b.text_normalized: These Meridia's Chosen, we've tried contacting them, offering them good credits, but to no avail.

782bb60c7e6347ca80918821377221f8fd583f19.speaker: Umbral
782bb60c7e6347ca80918821377221f8fd583f19.text_raw: They seem true fanatics, not easily swayed.
782bb60c7e6347ca80918821377221f8fd583f19.text_normalized: They seem true fanatics, not easily swayed.

1739e6e007c2a488175c459f29bb4323aa30eb08.speaker: Umbral
1739e6e007c2a488175c459f29bb4323aa30eb08.text_raw: Won't be the last of them, I'm afraid.
1739e6e007c2a488175c459f29bb4323aa30eb08.text_normalized: Won't be the last of them, I'm afraid.

f178d387bb9551511dbb01e131ce3e0d0188df5b.speaker: Umbral
f178d387bb9551511dbb01e131ce3e0d0188df5b.text_raw: However... the system is now secure enough for us to bring in the main construction force and start constructing the gate.
f178d387bb9551511dbb01e131ce3e0d0188df5b.text_normalized: However, the system is now secure enough for us to bring in the main construction force and start constructing the gate.

bf6d2ef5a0a09844d1832095f8dc6187706948fa.speaker: Umbral
bf6d2ef5a0a09844d1832095f8dc6187706948fa.text_raw: We still need to find a appropriate spot. We need you to go ahead and clear a potential location.
bf6d2ef5a0a09844d1832095f8dc6187706948fa.text_normalized: We still need to find a appropriate spot. We need you to go ahead and clear a potential location.

ffdf268ffc510f7d5315cf57c2b5e5b0fef197ef.speaker: Umbral
ffdf268ffc510f7d5315cf57c2b5e5b0fef197ef.text_raw: It is full with asteroids and debris.
ffdf268ffc510f7d5315cf57c2b5e5b0fef197ef.text_normalized: It is full with asteroids and debris.

022c462f5618b74d3e50817228383a6ee5f7f2e5.speaker: Umbral
022c462f5618b74d3e50817228383a6ee5f7f2e5.text_raw: Your efforts have made it so we can finally start the construction of the gate.
022c462f5618b74d3e50817228383a6ee5f7f2e5.text_normalized: Your efforts have made it so we can finally start the construction of the gate.

f32481da0af6dd20ed478a2ed3b9e9ddb46d4dbe.speaker: Umbral
f32481da0af6dd20ed478a2ed3b9e9ddb46d4dbe.text_raw: And your work has come to an end, as stated in the contract.
f32481da0af6dd20ed478a2ed3b9e9ddb46d4dbe.text_normalized: And your work has come to an end, as stated in the contract.

fd482962e50a3528c9a30f0650cfd0a25ff27892.speaker: Umbral
fd482962e50a3528c9a30f0650cfd0a25ff27892.text_raw: ...Anyways, the construction will take some time, but I look forward to your aid when we enter the Darkspace.
fd482962e50a3528c9a30f0650cfd0a25ff27892.text_normalized: . Anyways, the construction will take some time, but I look forward to your aid when we enter the Darkspace.

a7cd72675aaf5a060954a85aa0d13b3f5b9d1c67.speaker: Umbral
a7cd72675aaf5a060954a85aa0d13b3f5b9d1c67.text_raw: We'll have to write up a new contract, of course.
a7cd72675aaf5a060954a85aa0d13b3f5b9d1c67.text_normalized: We'll have to write up a new contract, of course.

3c56b96f71aa26e6e131cb3913d8372619d0fec4.speaker: ECHO
3c56b96f71aa26e6e131cb3913d8372619d0fec4.text_raw: I suggest negotiating a better deal on our part, more loot for instance.
3c56b96f71aa26e6e131cb3913d8372619d0fec4.text_normalized: I suggest negotiating a better deal on our part, more loot for instance.

090f951efd2a4c74fcfe18fa8f66680018202239.speaker: Umbral
090f951efd2a4c74fcfe18fa8f66680018202239.text_raw: In the mean time, upgrade your ships and crew for the venture into the Darkspace.
090f951efd2a4c74fcfe18fa8f66680018202239.text_normalized: In the mean time, upgrade your ships and crew for the venture into the Darkspace.

60e1932961a742b86ba4745e4cfaa90461402d00.speaker: Umbral
60e1932961a742b86ba4745e4cfaa90461402d00.text_raw: The upcoming conflict will not be for the weak...
60e1932961a742b86ba4745e4cfaa90461402d00.text_normalized: The upcoming conflict will not be for the weak.

0635040ad759a910254de1b3fc6e94fc669ce9b2.speaker: Umbral
0635040ad759a910254de1b3fc6e94fc669ce9b2.text_raw: Oh, and let's not forget your credit payment.
0635040ad759a910254de1b3fc6e94fc669ce9b2.text_normalized: Oh, and let's not forget your credit payment.

b99682b7f30d4e792f16043b7dc3c6c094b74d26.speaker: Midas
b99682b7f30d4e792f16043b7dc3c6c094b74d26.text_raw: May it be coincidence or not, but your assault against the traitors seemed to have awoken a larger presence of the fanatics.
b99682b7f30d4e792f16043b7dc3c6c094b74d26.text_normalized: May it be coincidence or not, but your assault against the traitors seemed to have awoken a larger presence of the fanatics.

f0b5e325061ad7e383d31e8f603ba510363dee99.speaker: Midas
f0b5e325061ad7e383d31e8f603ba510363dee99.text_raw: Meridia's Chosen they call themselfs. What a joke.
f0b5e325061ad7e383d31e8f603ba510363dee99.text_normalized: Meridia's Chosen they call themselfs. What a joke.

ded2d4424f1e45808f6ca12440a7ae47f19ab9c1.speaker: Midas
ded2d4424f1e45808f6ca12440a7ae47f19ab9c1.text_raw: Complete filth who are seeking to corrupt, like they did with the traitors.
ded2d4424f1e45808f6ca12440a7ae47f19ab9c1.text_normalized: Complete filth who are seeking to corrupt, like they did with the traitors.

c9e50ce39873dcde310b7dbbf49ee8ec96a430eb.speaker: Midas
c9e50ce39873dcde310b7dbbf49ee8ec96a430eb.text_raw: They are numerous, growing every cycle, converting more and more warriors for the upcoming conflict.
c9e50ce39873dcde310b7dbbf49ee8ec96a430eb.text_normalized: They are numerous, growing every cycle, converting more and more warriors for the upcoming conflict.

685c918c3020706404ab46afb9d53ebb34af3109.speaker: Midas
685c918c3020706404ab46afb9d53ebb34af3109.text_raw: They do not seek to use Metafiber like we do, only to corrupt it.
685c918c3020706404ab46afb9d53ebb34af3109.text_normalized: They do not seek to use Metafiber like we do, only to corrupt it.

16916df116e225c64c6f0065f9ea249b488c5fb9.speaker: Midas
16916df116e225c64c6f0065f9ea249b488c5fb9.text_raw: One of their warbands is trying to set up a stronghold.
16916df116e225c64c6f0065f9ea249b488c5fb9.text_normalized: One of their warbands is trying to set up a stronghold.

2aad2f562b37a0afd9883b3111846648eb477e7f.speaker: Midas
2aad2f562b37a0afd9883b3111846648eb477e7f.text_raw: I would like to use your power to help us destroy them.
2aad2f562b37a0afd9883b3111846648eb477e7f.text_normalized: I would like to use your power to help us destroy them.

0a94b72c71cad0c4112ea1110437a47c100695ce.speaker: Midas
0a94b72c71cad0c4112ea1110437a47c100695ce.text_raw: It would mean a great deal to us if you succeed.
0a94b72c71cad0c4112ea1110437a47c100695ce.text_normalized: It would mean a great deal to us if you succeed.

fa20aa6ce97579006135d34ee98b0f30fe307b84.speaker: ECHO
fa20aa6ce97579006135d34ee98b0f30fe307b84.text_raw: Captain, it seems like we should stay out of their way, instead of going towards them.
fa20aa6ce97579006135d34ee98b0f30fe307b84.text_normalized: Captain, it seems like we should stay out of their way, instead of going towards them.

7d8aff0e8b58601e68d6390969e1113f90fbebbb.speaker: Midas
7d8aff0e8b58601e68d6390969e1113f90fbebbb.text_raw: The jumpgate has already been unlocked by my forces.
7d8aff0e8b58601e68d6390969e1113f90fbebbb.text_normalized: The jumpgate has already been unlocked by my forces.

12720aaa6ffcf4db48ac0e7e04cc0c1f623e940c.speaker: Midas
12720aaa6ffcf4db48ac0e7e04cc0c1f623e940c.text_raw: I strongly advise you not to attack their station directly.
12720aaa6ffcf4db48ac0e7e04cc0c1f623e940c.text_normalized: I strongly advise you not to attack their station directly.

8c926dcfd9e0a1b96ba376659598c5e31ac8882f.speaker: Midas
8c926dcfd9e0a1b96ba376659598c5e31ac8882f.text_raw: Weaken the enemy forces around the system first. It'll reduce their reinforcements when you strike the station.
8c926dcfd9e0a1b96ba376659598c5e31ac8882f.text_normalized: Weaken the enemy forces around the system first. It'll reduce their reinforcements when you strike the station.

ed9badfcb6afc4480439069d08bb8c93d7965d36.speaker: ECHO
ed9badfcb6afc4480439069d08bb8c93d7965d36.text_raw: Captain, we are receiving a message.
ed9badfcb6afc4480439069d08bb8c93d7965d36.text_normalized: Captain, we are receiving a message.

73a3fc95988b0268e2b6d205e4eca2392f99413a.speaker: Midas
73a3fc95988b0268e2b6d205e4eca2392f99413a.text_raw: Well done milky, we destroyed their advances in this sector.
73a3fc95988b0268e2b6d205e4eca2392f99413a.text_normalized: Well done milky, we destroyed their advances in this sector.

8da5d399b528310f4116736477d7bbc83ce08c62.speaker: Midas
8da5d399b528310f4116736477d7bbc83ce08c62.text_raw: It will have slowed them down, but nothing more.
8da5d399b528310f4116736477d7bbc83ce08c62.text_normalized: It will have slowed them down, but nothing more.

6a757e566e5cc00df68f43637b537c77271e5d2e.speaker: Midas
6a757e566e5cc00df68f43637b537c77271e5d2e.text_raw: They are an inevitable plague upon our sectors.
6a757e566e5cc00df68f43637b537c77271e5d2e.text_normalized: They are an inevitable plague upon our sectors.

e207c854b65e33d6c38513ab357c94c6b5385733.speaker: Midas
e207c854b65e33d6c38513ab357c94c6b5385733.text_raw: Let's meet up at the following coordinates for our next course of action.
e207c854b65e33d6c38513ab357c94c6b5385733.text_normalized: Let's meet up at the following coordinates for our next course of action.

7142d2b927fd9cf0d7b90e57af9bf92f8375f00f.speaker: Midas
7142d2b927fd9cf0d7b90e57af9bf92f8375f00f.text_raw: Meridia's Chosen, may the meteors of Uron rain upon them, are not our only problem.
7142d2b927fd9cf0d7b90e57af9bf92f8375f00f.text_normalized: Meridia's Chosen, may the meteors of Uron rain upon them, are not our only problem.

44e129475336dffc441bd839aa981551f2ac3d6b.speaker: Midas
44e129475336dffc441bd839aa981551f2ac3d6b.text_raw: Your factions are knocking at our sectors. They are building their own gate, since we destroyed the old ones.
44e129475336dffc441bd839aa981551f2ac3d6b.text_normalized: Your factions are knocking at our sectors. They are building their own gate, since we destroyed the old ones.

eda52e09466c11dbb172162d97ac05ffcb3079a7.speaker: Midas
eda52e09466c11dbb172162d97ac05ffcb3079a7.text_raw: You do not understand. Our armadas are massive, enough to wipe out every warship in this quadrant.
eda52e09466c11dbb172162d97ac05ffcb3079a7.text_normalized: You do not understand. Our armadas are massive, enough to wipe out every warship in this quadrant.

44709911d89860d9160e75fc7344b61a09937175.speaker: Midas
44709911d89860d9160e75fc7344b61a09937175.text_raw: Sadly, they've been distracted, fighting on another front.
44709911d89860d9160e75fc7344b61a09937175.text_normalized: Sadly, they've been distracted, fighting on another front.

992a46ba475248f2a12f2ff48dc879d965098343.speaker: Midas
992a46ba475248f2a12f2ff48dc879d965098343.text_raw: So... we need to sabotage this construction as much as we can.
992a46ba475248f2a12f2ff48dc879d965098343.text_normalized: So, we need to sabotage this construction as much as we can.

a7889d13985fa5ae6b0b3935c55617c848f4fac7.speaker: Midas
a7889d13985fa5ae6b0b3935c55617c848f4fac7.text_raw: They require massive amounts of construction materials for their construction.
a7889d13985fa5ae6b0b3935c55617c848f4fac7.text_normalized: They require massive amounts of construction materials for their construction.

ca91fc3240672a7b4a331e692a5d717b93ae08c8.speaker: ECHO
ca91fc3240672a7b4a331e692a5d717b93ae08c8.text_raw: Captain, maybe don't mention you helped with hauling construction materials.
ca91fc3240672a7b4a331e692a5d717b93ae08c8.text_normalized: Captain, maybe don't mention you helped with hauling construction materials.

9fed197fb221730ce50175830958502c3c530d6a.speaker: Midas
9fed197fb221730ce50175830958502c3c530d6a.text_raw: ... Right. We've found a location for one of their cargo depots, it appears to be the least guarded.
9fed197fb221730ce50175830958502c3c530d6a.text_normalized: . Right. We've found a location for one of their cargo depots, it appears to be the least guarded.

98d5d1ba912be675e7180a95f3a76c51bc06e64c.speaker: Midas
98d5d1ba912be675e7180a95f3a76c51bc06e64c.text_raw: Escort one of our ships to the depot. We'll give them a little electromagnetic surprise.
98d5d1ba912be675e7180a95f3a76c51bc06e64c.text_normalized: Escort one of our ships to the depot. We'll give them a little electromagnetic surprise.

3a893a5fc892a7ea6467bd4f2b94cb68c2985bfb.speaker: Midas
3a893a5fc892a7ea6467bd4f2b94cb68c2985bfb.text_raw: We'll wait until you are clear of the zone, you've earned that.
3a893a5fc892a7ea6467bd4f2b94cb68c2985bfb.text_normalized: We'll wait until you are clear of the zone, you've earned that.

d8befeb71d7661c7ba76acb257599f28f4450bdb.speaker: ECHO
d8befeb71d7661c7ba76acb257599f28f4450bdb.text_raw: Now, get out of here! Back to
d8befeb71d7661c7ba76acb257599f28f4450bdb.text_normalized: Now, get out of here! Back to

2e4c1e0f61c46eb85ce30d967be192185c0c11d6.speaker: Midas
2e4c1e0f61c46eb85ce30d967be192185c0c11d6.text_raw: The bomb shut down their construction, temporarily.
2e4c1e0f61c46eb85ce30d967be192185c0c11d6.text_normalized: The bomb shut down their construction, temporarily.

daae630ef686e137cb0b841d7fad8b1f7b9f1da3.speaker: ECHO
daae630ef686e137cb0b841d7fad8b1f7b9f1da3.text_raw: There seem to be a lot of temporarily solutions lately.
daae630ef686e137cb0b841d7fad8b1f7b9f1da3.text_normalized: There seem to be a lot of temporarily solutions lately.

b05a92b4ba5cb1758c2edaa688468a3b73e2b838.speaker: Midas
b05a92b4ba5cb1758c2edaa688468a3b73e2b838.text_raw: Our focus on the invading factions also did us harm.
b05a92b4ba5cb1758c2edaa688468a3b73e2b838.text_normalized: Our focus on the invading factions also did us harm.

cf22d02eaca3eca3a1d873ecdcd3c5cb1c39e72f.speaker: Midas
cf22d02eaca3eca3a1d873ecdcd3c5cb1c39e72f.text_raw: Meridia's Filth has taken over our wormhole entry point into this quadrant.
cf22d02eaca3eca3a1d873ecdcd3c5cb1c39e72f.text_normalized: Meridia's Filth has taken over our wormhole entry point into this quadrant.

f88216bea085bbbc41894448b2521b96c60bf52f.speaker: Midas
f88216bea085bbbc41894448b2521b96c60bf52f.text_raw: I've gathered the remaining forces to repel them, and I would like your strength added to them.
f88216bea085bbbc41894448b2521b96c60bf52f.text_normalized: I've gathered the remaining forces to repel them, and I would like your strength added to them.

bc52decd888c3507ddcd0024ce96d116be36ecc1.speaker: Midas
bc52decd888c3507ddcd0024ce96d116be36ecc1.text_raw: Once you enter the location, we'll warp in.
bc52decd888c3507ddcd0024ce96d116be36ecc1.text_normalized: Once you enter the location, we'll warp in.

4eb06477dbd065cfd12dd787ebb74ceaee568db6.speaker: Midas
4eb06477dbd065cfd12dd787ebb74ceaee568db6.text_raw: But more will take their place soon.
4eb06477dbd065cfd12dd787ebb74ceaee568db6.text_normalized: But more will take their place soon.

7eeebe097a84b07f97901e26e8719c5d8fa1392d.speaker: Midas
7eeebe097a84b07f97901e26e8719c5d8fa1392d.text_raw: I don't know how, but the filth collapsed the wormhole. It will take us time before we can reestablish a new connection with our home.
7eeebe097a84b07f97901e26e8719c5d8fa1392d.text_normalized: I don't know how, but the filth collapsed the wormhole. It will take us time before we can reestablish a new connection with our home.

38bcceafa172a00d667de1d74948ddd841fed292.speaker: Midas
38bcceafa172a00d667de1d74948ddd841fed292.text_raw: I will contact you when that time arises.
38bcceafa172a00d667de1d74948ddd841fed292.text_normalized: I will contact you when that time arises.

cfbe69029b0929665f3527e9303d1191b52d370f.speaker: Midas
cfbe69029b0929665f3527e9303d1191b52d370f.text_raw: I feel like a reward is in place.
cfbe69029b0929665f3527e9303d1191b52d370f.text_normalized: I feel like a reward is in place.

97333b5cde5c247bd5a4d5172192c7a66a5581f7.speaker: Umbral
97333b5cde5c247bd5a4d5172192c7a66a5581f7.text_raw: We set up this small outpost, to act as a base of operations.
97333b5cde5c247bd5a4d5172192c7a66a5581f7.text_normalized: We set up this small outpost, to act as a base of operations.

1ad799d1dc3df4746563cb53d2ab7d4266f490b0.speaker: Umbral
1ad799d1dc3df4746563cb53d2ab7d4266f490b0.text_raw: ... Everything is going fine, we have expanded our Metafiber experiments.
1ad799d1dc3df4746563cb53d2ab7d4266f490b0.text_normalized: . Everything is going fine, we have expanded our Metafiber experiments.

44709cf09dba9f45ec7fcd6db3c304d851a23f4c.speaker: Umbral
44709cf09dba9f45ec7fcd6db3c304d851a23f4c.text_raw: New opportunities have arrived with the new war.
44709cf09dba9f45ec7fcd6db3c304d851a23f4c.text_normalized: New opportunities have arrived with the new war.

a04f21c93560f6710482aa121460b2b85f6c3447.speaker: Umbral
a04f21c93560f6710482aa121460b2b85f6c3447.text_raw: This is where we need you.
a04f21c93560f6710482aa121460b2b85f6c3447.text_normalized: This is where we need you.

a60f7d75c9d2e697a1cb43371d3441937ad33b22.speaker: Umbral
a60f7d75c9d2e697a1cb43371d3441937ad33b22.text_raw: The stations within the Conquest Sector were assembled rather crudely. Little attention was given to security.
a60f7d75c9d2e697a1cb43371d3441937ad33b22.text_normalized: The stations within the Conquest Sector were assembled rather crudely. Little attention was given to security.

b5e421e84591fc882823a62655d7dfbe9e2bff99.speaker: Umbral
b5e421e84591fc882823a62655d7dfbe9e2bff99.text_raw: Their software are not getting any security updates.
b5e421e84591fc882823a62655d7dfbe9e2bff99.text_normalized: Their software are not getting any security updates.

018f5cf1116a64f5a4bec48755034cfdcc3436d5.speaker: Umbral
018f5cf1116a64f5a4bec48755034cfdcc3436d5.text_raw: That is where we found our in.
018f5cf1116a64f5a4bec48755034cfdcc3436d5.text_normalized: That is where we found our in.

c5140b1f23fca558638f95aecd60d0cd0b20db0b.speaker: Umbral
c5140b1f23fca558638f95aecd60d0cd0b20db0b.text_raw: I will provide you with a specialized infiltration tool. A hacking tool if you will.
c5140b1f23fca558638f95aecd60d0cd0b20db0b.text_normalized: I will provide you with a specialized infiltration tool. A hacking tool if you will.

0e674643b619cd038334b84313f137feb1feabf4.speaker: Umbral
0e674643b619cd038334b84313f137feb1feabf4.text_raw: Use this on any friendly station within the Conquest Sector.
0e674643b619cd038334b84313f137feb1feabf4.text_normalized: Use this on any friendly station within the Conquest Sector.

1913ad41e013435a15f5d06b0752e2513d7313e7.speaker: Umbral
1913ad41e013435a15f5d06b0752e2513d7313e7.text_raw: It will infect their systems... and persist, even if they attempt repairs or complete reconstruction.
1913ad41e013435a15f5d06b0752e2513d7313e7.text_normalized: It will infect their systems, and persist, even if they attempt repairs or complete reconstruction.

9c7550a10fc82fc5e374d6bc15b0f2bb5a206941.speaker: Umbral
9c7550a10fc82fc5e374d6bc15b0f2bb5a206941.text_raw: How? Probably the cloud, I don't know... Not that important.
9c7550a10fc82fc5e374d6bc15b0f2bb5a206941.text_normalized: How? Probably the cloud, I don't know. Not that important.

ae325f039094fbb8c4d10d5a72edb2b39168e641.speaker: Umbral
ae325f039094fbb8c4d10d5a72edb2b39168e641.text_raw: It's all safe for you. You will not suffer any reputation loss with the station you choose, should really only be benefitial.
ae325f039094fbb8c4d10d5a72edb2b39168e641.text_normalized: It's all safe for you. You will not suffer any reputation loss with the station you choose, should really only be benefitial.

017a69500eba14165724c030b8ce665ca3783f92.speaker: Umbral
017a69500eba14165724c030b8ce665ca3783f92.text_raw: Once successful, I will make contact.
017a69500eba14165724c030b8ce665ca3783f92.text_normalized: Once successful, I will make contact.

59fe5736f3b30c0bd3868eb5054ec0c1609bbfa7.speaker: Umbral
59fe5736f3b30c0bd3868eb5054ec0c1609bbfa7.text_raw: Alright, we have set up the Umbral Reach board, there you will be able to find a mission which will infect their systems further.
59fe5736f3b30c0bd3868eb5054ec0c1609bbfa7.text_normalized: Alright, we have set up the Umbral Reach board, there you will be able to find a mission which will infect their systems further.

e1c3aa4854d8cb1120cbaaf27f8264b0e44a4291.speaker: Umbral
e1c3aa4854d8cb1120cbaaf27f8264b0e44a4291.text_raw: Once we reach full infection in the station, we will seek contact again.
e1c3aa4854d8cb1120cbaaf27f8264b0e44a4291.text_normalized: Once we reach full infection in the station, we will seek contact again.

65062d92e31acfc585cfc8414ebd815dfa097273.speaker: ECHO
65062d92e31acfc585cfc8414ebd815dfa097273.text_raw: Oh! A new button Captain, let's press it.
65062d92e31acfc585cfc8414ebd815dfa097273.text_normalized: Oh! A new button Captain, let's press it.

074ec3547dec7fa72b1435e9065a9e0cd1f734c0.speaker: Umbral
074ec3547dec7fa72b1435e9065a9e0cd1f734c0.text_raw: That was a lot quicker then anticipated..
074ec3547dec7fa72b1435e9065a9e0cd1f734c0.text_normalized: That was a lot quicker then anticipated.

36926e616c406153643d42fb76eb25568d196e8b.speaker: Umbral
36926e616c406153643d42fb76eb25568d196e8b.text_raw: Head back to the outpost, as I heard Stella has arrived there from the Frontier.
36926e616c406153643d42fb76eb25568d196e8b.text_normalized: Head back to the outpost, as I heard Stella has arrived there from the Frontier.

3b21b327b65ea322e1188ce4ee908954b653abea.speaker: Umbral
3b21b327b65ea322e1188ce4ee908954b653abea.text_raw: She will be your liason going forward.
3b21b327b65ea322e1188ce4ee908954b653abea.text_normalized: She will be your liason going forward.

0836a1453fa10e7eb40b623999988475b060602e.speaker: Umbral
0836a1453fa10e7eb40b623999988475b060602e.text_raw: And she will make a fine agent out of you yet.
0836a1453fa10e7eb40b623999988475b060602e.text_normalized: And she will make a fine agent out of you yet.

8dbd4b4d6042be63f988d942140e9101bdcd6a8e.speaker: Stella Chion
8dbd4b4d6042be63f988d942140e9101bdcd6a8e.text_raw: No... Ok? Sure... I'm fine thank you.
8dbd4b4d6042be63f988d942140e9101bdcd6a8e.text_normalized: No. Ok? Sure, I'm fine thank you.

c6d34eaaeb2be66dbbe9d44ee55743245caba160.speaker: Stella Chion
c6d34eaaeb2be66dbbe9d44ee55743245caba160.text_raw: I have to fit my new role, you understand.
c6d34eaaeb2be66dbbe9d44ee55743245caba160.text_normalized: I have to fit my new role, you understand.

823fd1cfd1631c46afa6a72db8d7963cfca1f172.speaker: Stella Chion
823fd1cfd1631c46afa6a72db8d7963cfca1f172.text_raw: I have been tasked overseeing your efforts in this new sector.
823fd1cfd1631c46afa6a72db8d7963cfca1f172.text_normalized: I have been tasked overseeing your efforts in this new sector.

a3ba4464711373f71c693d1928c920b8fe61b941.speaker: Stella Chion
a3ba4464711373f71c693d1928c920b8fe61b941.text_raw: We don't need to take over by force, if we can just control the opposition.
a3ba4464711373f71c693d1928c920b8fe61b941.text_normalized: We don't need to take over by force, if we can just control the opposition.

ee5fba946923b1c2f7b6746665cb99744452c32b.speaker: Stella Chion
ee5fba946923b1c2f7b6746665cb99744452c32b.text_raw: But sometimes... force is required, the destruction of the enemy! Eliminate them! Vaporize them! Shred them down to their beams!
ee5fba946923b1c2f7b6746665cb99744452c32b.text_normalized: But sometimes, force is required, the destruction of the enemy! Eliminate them! Vaporize them! Shred them down to their beams!

e215d9d06f3f5fddef89fbc372f6c500101548d0.speaker: ECHO
e215d9d06f3f5fddef89fbc372f6c500101548d0.text_raw: Other then that, are you alright?
e215d9d06f3f5fddef89fbc372f6c500101548d0.text_normalized: Other then that, are you alright?

4ce605185e4b246ec50b8e8c00d7b2052bc0bc63.speaker: Stella Chion
4ce605185e4b246ec50b8e8c00d7b2052bc0bc63.text_raw: ... yes... We discovered some wannabe spies closeby, surely trying to gather intel on our new presence here.
4ce605185e4b246ec50b8e8c00d7b2052bc0bc63.text_normalized: , yes. We discovered some wannabe spies closeby, surely trying to gather intel on our new presence here.

0e6aafa0ba2a4a81fabb3e134c9d411248793a34.speaker: Stella Chion
0e6aafa0ba2a4a81fabb3e134c9d411248793a34.text_raw: Right, I forgot... make sure you bring one of those Decoy Transponders with you from the shop, if you value your reputation with whoever you will encounter.
0e6aafa0ba2a4a81fabb3e134c9d411248793a34.text_normalized: Right, I forgot, make sure you bring one of those Decoy Transponders with you from the shop, if you value your reputation with whoever you will encounter.

0698a8eb1ffd774bdee9a46515e9c9e767e065c8.speaker: ECHO
0698a8eb1ffd774bdee9a46515e9c9e767e065c8.text_raw: Interesting. Captain, the spoofed transponder signature will persist only until your next station docking.
0698a8eb1ffd774bdee9a46515e9c9e767e065c8.text_normalized: Interesting. Captain, the spoofed transponder signature will persist only until your next station docking.

6f09767e49aae5bd4f3dcf1c151672bd914cb423.speaker: Stella Chion
6f09767e49aae5bd4f3dcf1c151672bd914cb423.text_raw: It was the Omnitac Agency all along!
6f09767e49aae5bd4f3dcf1c151672bd914cb423.text_normalized: It was the Omnitac Agency all along!

7a01949e0219d836ffcb7fc8f35ae979fd1ed15b.speaker: ECHO
7a01949e0219d836ffcb7fc8f35ae979fd1ed15b.text_raw: An esteemed escort service would probably not operate without someone hiring them.
7a01949e0219d836ffcb7fc8f35ae979fd1ed15b.text_normalized: An esteemed escort service would probably not operate without someone hiring them.

9cba63157a19dd1cfd82d672ce45b9e44ddfb34b.speaker: Stella Chion
9cba63157a19dd1cfd82d672ce45b9e44ddfb34b.text_raw: This does not help us any further, we are dealing with someone trying to cover their warp signature.
9cba63157a19dd1cfd82d672ce45b9e44ddfb34b.text_normalized: This does not help us any further, we are dealing with someone trying to cover their warp signature.

c362b9ce9de167738c4cdd287cc47e354962ffd1.speaker: Stella Chion
c362b9ce9de167738c4cdd287cc47e354962ffd1.text_raw: We'll have to let our agents infiltrate further and gather information.
c362b9ce9de167738c4cdd287cc47e354962ffd1.text_normalized: We'll have to let our agents infiltrate further and gather information.

73ea85189a6bea5ad568b0561754627d8da1d381.speaker: Stella Chion
73ea85189a6bea5ad568b0561754627d8da1d381.text_raw: In the meantime, your task is to infect more stations.
73ea85189a6bea5ad568b0561754627d8da1d381.text_normalized: In the meantime, your task is to infect more stations.

85f91fcecd68348942fa3ec53b1cec419a482876.speaker: Stella Chion
85f91fcecd68348942fa3ec53b1cec419a482876.text_raw: Check out the shop if you need more hacking tools.
85f91fcecd68348942fa3ec53b1cec419a482876.text_normalized: Check out the shop if you need more hacking tools.

398fc36444fb09a8eef4ddd75421a023a47056c9.speaker: Stella Chion
398fc36444fb09a8eef4ddd75421a023a47056c9.text_raw: Return to me once you have reach the target.
398fc36444fb09a8eef4ddd75421a023a47056c9.text_normalized: Return to me once you have reach the target.

0a0045d7ff0db568146a2b1f7ea1483fb30d91c0.speaker: ECHO
0a0045d7ff0db568146a2b1f7ea1483fb30d91c0.text_raw: Captain, hacking other stations will work the same as you did with the first station, but the conquest station you are trying to infect has to be adjecent to an already infected station's system.
0a0045d7ff0db568146a2b1f7ea1483fb30d91c0.text_normalized: Captain, hacking other stations will work the same as you did with the first station, but the conquest station you are trying to infect has to be adjecent to an already infected station's system.

cf2f83678cf3b4e4cde9643d78f487cd500d3443.speaker: Umbral
cf2f83678cf3b4e4cde9643d78f487cd500d3443.text_raw: Stella is waiting for you at the outpost. Report to her at once.
cf2f83678cf3b4e4cde9643d78f487cd500d3443.text_normalized: Stella is waiting for you at the outpost. Report to her at once.

990bb1a2ed8354c6c6d6a70b0c734928dd160f1a.speaker: Stella Chion
990bb1a2ed8354c6c6d6a70b0c734928dd160f1a.text_raw: Let's get right to it. We don't know anything about who hired the Omnitac mercs, yet.
990bb1a2ed8354c6c6d6a70b0c734928dd160f1a.text_normalized: Let's get right to it. We don't know anything about who hired the Omnitac mercs, yet.

e5c031fa6e55c0b2282563f979125af1a7cccf38.speaker: Stella Chion
e5c031fa6e55c0b2282563f979125af1a7cccf38.text_raw: What we did discover is the location of several research facilities.
e5c031fa6e55c0b2282563f979125af1a7cccf38.text_normalized: What we did discover is the location of several research facilities.

c382a7165848ab43422c956adafbc718b2154221.speaker: Stella Chion
c382a7165848ab43422c956adafbc718b2154221.text_raw: One for each of the major factions. They are, like us, experimenting on Metafiber.
c382a7165848ab43422c956adafbc718b2154221.text_normalized: One for each of the major factions. They are, like us, experimenting on Metafiber.

57d34a4dcfd0afc4c13b8f68e11e170912bfcc25.speaker: Stella Chion
57d34a4dcfd0afc4c13b8f68e11e170912bfcc25.text_raw: We need their data slates, it would speed up our research by quite a bit.
57d34a4dcfd0afc4c13b8f68e11e170912bfcc25.text_normalized: We need their data slates, it would speed up our research by quite a bit.

6d5530bc537df2e2e7035b167ed6355054194269.speaker: Stella Chion
6d5530bc537df2e2e7035b167ed6355054194269.text_raw: Expect resistance, it should be heavily guarded.
6d5530bc537df2e2e7035b167ed6355054194269.text_normalized: Expect resistance, it should be heavily guarded.

c5c9d635b72057c549c3eba4dc8a229207897483.speaker: Stella Chion
c5c9d635b72057c549c3eba4dc8a229207897483.text_raw: But, all we need are the data slates, which are most likely in the Core part of the station.
c5c9d635b72057c549c3eba4dc8a229207897483.text_normalized: But, all we need are the data slates, which are most likely in the Core part of the station.

42ad48290484582b234abf1f9f328dc5323df6fa.speaker: Stella Chion
42ad48290484582b234abf1f9f328dc5323df6fa.text_raw: I could be an quick and easy snatch job, acquire them however you see fit.
42ad48290484582b234abf1f9f328dc5323df6fa.text_normalized: I could be an quick and easy snatch job, acquire them however you see fit.

7558c341505adc63bbc39e1a104076ab71648594.speaker: Stella Chion
7558c341505adc63bbc39e1a104076ab71648594.text_raw: Return them to me after acquiring them.
7558c341505adc63bbc39e1a104076ab71648594.text_normalized: Return them to me after acquiring them.
